title: Secret Messages
subtitle: Turn your messages into secret code that only your friends can read! 🤫
passwordPlaceholder: Pick a password only you know...
shareTip: Remember: Share the secret code AND the password with your friend. Without the password, nobody can read it!
tipStrongLockText: We use AES-256 — the same encryption that banks and governments use to keep secrets safe!
tipAlwaysDifferentText: Even if you encrypt the same message twice, the secret code looks totally different each time!
tipOnYourComputerText: Your message never leaves your device. Everything happens right here — super private!
tipPasswordKeyText: If you forget your password, the message is gone forever. No one can get it back — not even us!
